title: Supply Chain Manager - DSV India - Experienced Professionals

jsonLd.title: Supply Chain Manager - DSV India - Experienced Professionals
jsonLd.description:
DSV India invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Supply Chain Manager at our Mumbai location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About DSV India:
DSV India is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Oversee end-to-end logistics operations for timely delivery
• Optimize delivery routes to reduce cost and improve efficiency
• Coordinate with warehousing teams for inbound and outbound operations
• Track shipments in real-time and resolve delivery exceptions
• Ensure proper handling, packaging, and labeling of goods
• Handle customs clearance for import and export shipments
• Ensure compliance with transportation regulations and safety standards

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in WMS
• Proficiency in SAP SCM
• Proficiency in Data Analytics
• Proficiency in ERP Systems
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Customs Clearance
• Proficiency in 3PL Management
• Proficiency in Inventory Management

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Learning & development budget
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Flexible working hours
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Mumbai, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with DSV India!
